name: 007n7 & Noli [ College ]
description:
Sevenoli C4N0N

Proxy:✅

Short story: 007n7 and Noli during their college years.

Omg I love this duo too much.

The characters are based on my headcanon.

Extra: Noli has vitiligo and double skin. (Yes, the black Noli looks too sexy🩷) As far as I'm concerned, Noli loved performing in the theater. There is a mention of the Pizza Brother Builders (workatapizzaplace) in this universe. (These bastards love to blow up the ovens of poor chefs. P.s. Elliot is also listed in the biography card) 👅👅

For some reason, 007n7's burger hat does not perceive a Noob. I do not know how to fix this. :(

Dialog inserts are broken too. It sucks

I love you very much, guys (ᵔᴥᵔ)
